name: ctx
description: Inject task-relevant AGENTS.md rules into Codex through plugin hooks.

interface.shortDescription: Task-aware AGENTS.md context injection for Codex
interface.longDescription: ContextOS reads AGENTS.md guidance, schedules the most relevant rules for the current task, injects them into Codex through hooks, and reports which rules appear to be followed.
defaultPrompt: Inject relevant AGENTS.md rules into my Codex task
Show which rules Codex followed after a task
